title: ClawSeat Decision Payload v1
description: Cross-seat decision escalation contract per RFC-002 §6. Used by planner→memory (escalation), memory→koder (Feishu render), koder→memory (user reply translation).

decision_id.description: UUID v4. Used by koder to relate user reply back to original decision.

issue_id.description: Backlog issue reference, or 'NEW' if not yet filed.

category.description: Per RFC-002 §5 escalation criteria. Determines whether memory must escalate to koder→Feishu (always for these 6) vs decide locally (any other context).

context.description: ≤200 字 (Chinese) problem statement. Plain language, not jargon.

label.description: Short button label for Feishu card.

default_if_timeout.description: Either an option id ('A'-'F'), 'wait' (extend timeout), or 'abort' (cancel decision).

items.description: Absolute or ~-prefixed file path. koder reads these to render context-rich Feishu card.

decided_at.description: Set by koder when user responds OR by timeout handler.

decided_by.description: 'operator' (user clicked) | 'timeout' (default fired) | 'memory' (self-decided, only if category not in §5 list).

chosen_option_id.description: Set when decided. Must match one of options[].id.

free_text_reply.description: If user used '我有别的想法' button OR free-typed Feishu reply. koder translates to agent prompt.
